# SDASMS - Digital Evangelism & Communication Platform

A modern landing page and communication platform built for Seventh-day Adventist churches and ministries across Africa. Powered by the SDASMS API for multi-channel messaging (SMS, WhatsApp, Voice, Email, and more).

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4
- **UI Components**: shadcn/ui
- **API Integration**: SDASMS HTTP API & v3 REST API

## Features

- Multi-channel messaging: SMS, WhatsApp, Voice, Email, MMS, RCS, Viber, Instagram, Messenger, Live Chat
- Real API integration for SMS sending via SDASMS backend
- Contacts API integration (CRUD operations via SDASMS API)
- Quick Send widget with rate limiting
- Dark purple/black theme optimized for readability
- Responsive design for all devices
- Policy pages (Privacy, Terms, Cookies, Refund)

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+ 
- Bun (recommended) or npm

### Installation

```bash
bun install
```

### Environment Setup

Create a `.env` file in the root directory:

```env
SDASMS_API_TOKEN=your_api_token_here
```

### Development

```bash
bun dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) in your browser.

### Production Build

```bash
bun build
bun start
```

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── page.tsx                    # Home page (hero + Quick Send + API config)
│   ├── layout.tsx                  # Root layout with header/footer
│   ├── api/
│   │   ├── send-sms/route.ts       # SMS sending endpoint
│   │   └── contacts/[groupId]/     # Contacts CRUD API routes
│   ├── products/                   # 10 product pages (sms, whatsapp, voice, etc.)
│   ├── pricing/                    # Pricing page
│   ├── features/                   # Features overview
│   ├── coverage/                   # Africa coverage map
│   ├── contact/                    # Contact form
│   ├── use-cases/                  # Use cases page
│   └── policies/                   # Legal pages
├── components/
│   ├── Header.tsx                  # Navigation header
│   ├── Footer.tsx                  # Site footer
│   ├── PageHero.tsx               # Reusable hero component
│   └── ui/                         # shadcn/ui components
└── lib/
    ├── sdasms-api.ts              # SDASMS API client
    ├── utils.ts                    # Utility functions
    └── db.ts                       # Database utilities
```

## API Endpoints

### Send SMS
```
POST /api/send-sms
Body: { phone: "255XXXXXXXXX", message: "Hello" }
```

### Contacts Management
```
POST   /api/contacts/{groupId}/store          # Create contact
GET    /api/contacts/{groupId}/all             # List all contacts
GET    /api/contacts/{groupId}/search/{uid}    # Search contact
PUT    /api/contacts/{groupId}/update/{uid}    # Update contact
DELETE /api/contacts/{groupId}/delete/{uid}    # Delete contact
```
